title: The Straw Hats Inside a Giant Mystery
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Road, Luffy as The Straw Hats enter an unfamiliar Elbaf setting, encounter giant-scale mysteries, and begin separating the false world around them from the real island.
scene: The Straw Hats enter an unfamiliar Elbaf setting, encounter giant-scale mysteries, and begin separating the false world around them from the real island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: just remember, this vast land belongs to the sun god.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: God?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even the big Stein Castle which I help maintain...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...is the domain of duties like the great iskat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Oh, someone lives there?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: No... a cat...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah, our bad! We kinda whooped that CA--!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to put it simply, this is a land of gods.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Now then, I must be off.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The needle god must be starving by now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All that uproar over the ear God being burned really delayed me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're hungry, head to town for some fodder rations.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Also, heed this warning. Do not follow this road.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Huh, why not?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The rabid Guardians Protect the Sun God's Temple Beyond That Point!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No-one has ever ventured past there and returned to tell the tale!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That wording!! Take it back before--!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hmmm...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: WAAA AAAAT!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Thanks a lot, Gramps!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Sorry about all this!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Huh--?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Rabid Guardians, huh???

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You and Luffy basically enable each other at this point!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Don't you ever think things through?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: WHAT HAPPEND TO THE CASTLE?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This place reeks of adventure!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Didn't you hear him? Rabbit guardians?! gods?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hold up, Luffy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This place is seriously huge!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Can't see any buildings ahead...

dialogue.speaker: Road
dialogue.text: Just how long is this freaking road?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait, look at that castle! Doesn't it look like the other one???

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ZEE ZEH.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Someone's running this way! They're in Elbaf gear, too...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Whatever! I'll just dodge him!

summary: This part advances the Arrival in Elbaf through 36 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
